generated_oml:
instance BuildingSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Infrastructure assets in the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain, specifically buildings, characterized by integration of static models with real-time operational data to enable simulation, analysis, and optimization across the entire building lifecycle from design to operation phases."
    base:contains BIMGeometricModel, BIMSensor, BIMActuator, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, DecisionSupportService, VisualizationService
]

instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based geometric models enriched with Building Control System (BCS) components defined by Building Control Engineers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDETransformationEnabler
]

instance BIMSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors defined by Building Control Engineers in BIM with endpoint addresses extracted as metadata for device addressing"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BIMSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance BIMSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BIMSensor
]

instance BIMSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor readings transmitted via standardized protocols"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance BIMActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators modeled by Building Control Engineers within BIM with endpoint addresses extracted as metadata during MDE-based transformation"
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing for building sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insights for infrastructure management across building lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance and operational optimization in building management"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight, OperationalOptimizationInsight, RemoteActuatorControlAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation capabilities for building performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceSimulationInsight
]

instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis services for operational optimization and decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalAnalysisInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making capabilities for AECO stakeholders including architects, engineers, and facility managers"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for immersive monitoring and control interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems for operational awareness"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for maintenance scheduling to prevent failures"
]

instance OperationalOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for optimizing building operational efficiency"
]

instance BuildingPerformanceSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated building performance data for analysis and planning"
]

instance OperationalAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis results supporting operational decisions"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights to support strategic decisions by AECO stakeholders"
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization interfaces for real-time building monitoring and control"
]

instance RemoteActuatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Precise addressing and remote control of physical actuators through standardized communication protocols"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MDETransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) processes to extract structured representations from enriched BIM models and generate deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, AnalysisService
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance DataExchangeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensuring continuous synchronization between physical buildings and digital counterparts through bidirectional data exchange facilitated by the DT Framework"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, VisualizationService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs real-time monitoring and live synchronization between physical assets and their digital counterparts, with continuous data exchange to support immediate insights and decision-making."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via a model-driven framework with modular architecture, integrating Eclipse Hono and Ditto for IoT data management and leveraging Unreal Engine for high-fidelity visualization to ensure seamless component integration and system-wide coordination."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to generate deployable artifacts, real-time data exchange for synchronization with physical systems, interactive visualization for Facility Manager operations, and evolution through DT Engineers integrating custom services via modular extensions. Lifecycle governance is structured across stakeholder roles with automated phase transitions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points supports integration of custom services and analytics, enabling DTs to evolve with changing operational requirements. Runtime configuration management allows adjustments without requiring full redeployment, addressing scalability from individual components to entire infrastructure systems and maintainability through low-overhead updates."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integrates external systems through standardized frameworks, enabling bidirectional communication between virtual and physical assets using Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange and interoperability with enterprise systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework implements a modular architecture with standardized extension points to enable integration of custom services and analytics, though no specific industry standards, compliance frameworks, or interoperability specifications are detailed in the document."
]
